message:
fix(staking): add state-machine guard to prevent appeal resolution on terminal stakes

Without this check, resolving a stale appeal on a Withdrawn or Expired
stake would incorrectly revive it to Active status, bypassing terminal-
state guarantees. The new guard in resolve_appeal() validates that the
stake is in UnderAppeal state before proceeding, returning
ERR_STAKE_INVALID_TRANSITION with a descriptive message otherwise.

This prevents a correctness/security bug where terminal-state stakes
could be silently resurrected through the appeal resolution path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
